messages:
Hi Omar, I hope you’re doing well. 
I wanted to let you know that my flight arrives at Cairo Airport at 8:05 AM. 

By the time I collect my luggage and exit the airport, I expect to be out around 9:00 AM. 

Would it be possible to arrange an early check-in around 9:30 or 10:00 AM? I would really appreciate it. 

Thank you in advance for your kind support.

Hi Omar, I hope you’re doing well. I wanted to let you know that my flight arrives at Cairo Airport at 8:05 AM. By the time I collect my luggage and exit the airport, I expect to be out around 9:00 AM. 

Would it be possible to arrange an early check-in around 9:30 or 10:00 AM? I would really appreciate it. 

Thank you in advance for your kind support.
Hallo Mr.Omar
The other guest is my little brother
Im from Saudi Arabia
Is only me and my little brother hatem
We are family
Same last name
And I was studying my bachelor degree in USA as well as I study my master in UK all my life been outward Saudi Arabia
I do not have another nationality because the Saudi citizenship does not allow dual nationality or holding another citizenship.”

Please check the compound and let me know if they allow us to come, because the flight is in two days, and we barely have time to make it. 
So, please get back to me as soon as possible.

When I tried to book through Airbnb, I didn’t realize the booking wasn’t direct and that the host had to accept it. 

So now, you’re telling me to check if my younger brother and I can stay, by verifying the compound rules.

 I really need to confirm my booking as soon as possible because good accommodations might get fully booked quickly. 
Please let me know right away. 

ASAP Plz
你好，请问介意混合团体入住吗？
Message unsent
好的，那我需要取消预订了，打扰了

صباح الفل استاذ عمر
كيف حالكم
الشقة في اي دور؟
واي عمارة
وهل هي مطلة عالحديقة؟
انتظرردكم وشكر لكم
Hello, looking forward to our trip to Cairo with my family!
Hello, looking forward to our stay next. Do you know or recommend any tour guides and drivers?
Thank you, what about any apps to book taxis which are safe and reliable?
Thank you!
Hello just to let you know we will landing at 9pm so should get to the Airbnb for 10pm
Is there anything that we need to do?
Thank you, I will send passport copies
Hello thank you for accommodating it was a great stay. I wanted to ask if by any chance a digital camera was left at the apartment?
I’m not but we can’t find it so I thought I’ll check if we left it at the apartment
Thank you for checking we have maybe left it somewhere else
